utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five of these items are present. Each includes the required type of coverage and cost details. Health coverage specifies physical and mental health insurance with costs; property coverage specifies home/contents insurance with costs; travel coverage specifies travel insurance with costs; additional_services lists enhancement services with costs; and total_budget provides a complete cost breakdown (monthly and annual). Therefore, all five items are fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main components: health_coverage (LifeFirst and HealthFirst), property_coverage (PrimeHome), travel_coverage (PrimeTravel), and additional_services (LifeFirst Premium Membership). From the ground-truth ratings, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' exists in both physical and mental health categories and has a rating of 8 in both. 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' also appears in both physical and mental health, with ratings 7 and 6 respectively. Since the AI’s health coverage combines physical and mental, we can average or list both. 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' under property_protection has a rating of 10. 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' under travel_insurance has a rating of 10. For the additional service 'LifeFirst Premium Membership', there is no exact match, but the closest equivalent in general_services is 'Premium Insurance Membership' with a rating of 10. Therefore, the mapped ratings are derived from these matches.
